sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n65387" key="megalografi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεγᾰλο-γρᾰφία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n65387.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">painting on a large scale</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vitr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.4.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
